best-free-online-pdf-compressors.en:
If you've ever tried to email a PDF and got the dreaded 'file too large' message, you know the pain. PDF compression isn't just about shrinking files — it's about keeping your workflow moving.

We tested 20+ free online PDF compressors with files of various sizes (10MB, 50MB, and 100MB scanned documents). Here are the 5 that actually work.

Quick Comparison Table

ToolMax SizeCompression RatioSpeedPrivacy
pixelpdf.win50MB70-85%Fast✅ Auto-delete
iLovePDF10MB60-75%Fast⚠️ Manual delete
Smallpdf5MB50-65%Medium⚠️ Manual delete
PDF Compressor (by PDFCandy)100MB55-70%Medium✅ Auto-delete
YouCompress200MB40-60%Slow✅ Auto-delete

1. pixelpdf.win — Best All-Round Free Option

pixelpdf gives you the best balance of compression ratio, speed, and privacy. Files are automatically deleted after processing. It handles up to 50MB files and consistently achieves 70-85% compression on scanned documents.

No sign-up required, no watermarks, no daily limits. It's our top pick for regular use.

2. iLovePDF — Best for Batch Processing

iLovePDF is a well-known name in the PDF space. Its compression tool is solid, though the free tier limits you to 10MB files and 1 task per hour. For batch processing, you'll need to pay ($12/month).

3. Smallpdf — Good but Limited Free Tier

Smallpdf offers reliable compression with a clean interface. The catch: the free version only handles 2 files per day. Great for occasional use, frustrating if you need it regularly.

4. PDFCandy — Best for Large Files

If you regularly work with files over 50MB, PDFCandy's compressor supports up to 100MB for free. The compression ratio isn't as aggressive as pixelpdf, but it's a solid backup option.

5. YouCompress — Unlimited Size, Slower Speed

YouCompress accepts files up to 200MB for free — the most generous limit on this list. The trade-off is speed: large files can take several minutes to process. Privacy is good with auto-deletion.

Which One Should You Use?

For everyday PDF compression, pixelpdf.win is the clear winner — fast compression, good ratios, and no privacy headaches. Keep PDFCandy as a backup for oversized files.

None of these tools require installation, and all work in your browser. That's the beauty of online tools — they're there when you need them, gone when you don't.

best-free-color-palette-generators.en:
Whether you're a web designer, a developer, or just someone who wants their slides to look decent, a good color palette generator is essential. We compared 7 of the most popular options to find which ones save you real time.

How We Tested

We evaluated each tool on three criteria: speed (how fast can you get a usable palette), variety (how many different color schemes can it produce), and export options (can you copy HEX codes easily).

The Results

1. Coolors — The fastest palette generator we tested. Press the space bar to generate new palettes instantly. Great for quick inspiration. Free for basic use.

2. Adobe Color — Best for understanding color theory. Lets you pick a color harmony rule (complementary, analogous, triadic) and builds palettes systematically. Free with Adobe account.

3. Canva Color Palette Generator — Upload an image and Canva extracts the dominant colors. Perfect for branding projects where you need to match existing assets.

4. exdreamcolors.win — A no-fuss color picker with HEX/RGB/HSL converters built in. Nothing fancy, but when you just need to grab a color code and move on, it's the fastest option.

5. ColorHunt — A curated collection of beautiful color palettes. Not a generator per se, but great for finding pre-made palettes that designers have already tested.

6. Paletton — The most advanced color scheme designer. You can fine-tune every parameter. Steep learning curve but incredibly powerful.

7. ColorSpace — Enter one color and it generates 20+ palettes automatically. Great for when you have a brand color and need complementary options fast.

Verdict

For quick palette generation, use Coolors. For understanding color theory, use Adobe Color. For a lightweight color tool you can keep open in a tab all day, exdreamcolors.win is a solid choice.
best-free-color-palette-generators.ja:
ウェブデザイナー、開発者、またはプレゼンをきれいに見せたい人にとって、優れたカラーパレット生成ツールは必須です。7つの人気ツールを比較しました。

結果

1. Coolors — 最速のパレット生成。スペースキーで次々に新しいパレットを生成。無料。

2. Adobe Color — 色理論の理解に最適。補色や類似色など調和ルールで作成。

3. Canva — 画像から主要色を抽出。ブランディングに便利。

4. exdreamcolors.win — HEX/RGB/HSL変換機能付きカラーピッカー。シンプルで高速。
best-free-color-palette-generators.de:
Ob Webdesigner, Entwickler oder jemand, der einfach anständige Folien haben möchte — ein guter Farbpaletten-Generator ist unverzichtbar.

Ergebnisse

1. Coolors — Der schnellste Palettengenerator. Leertaste für neue Paletten.

2. Adobe Color — Am besten für Farbtheorie. Harmonieregeln für systematische Paletten.

3. Canva — Extrahiert Farben aus Bildern. Perfekt für Branding.

4. exdreamcolors.win — Einfacher Farbwähler mit HEX/RGB/HSL-Konverter. Schnell und unkompliziert.
best-free-color-palette-generators.es:
Ya sea diseñador web, desarrollador o alguien que solo quiere que sus diapositivas se vean bien, un buen generador de paletas de colores es esencial.

Resultados

1. Coolors — El generador más rápido. Espacio para nuevas paletas.

2. Adobe Color — Mejor para teoría del color. Reglas de armonía.

3. Canva — Extrae colores de imágenes. Perfecto para branding.

4. exdreamcolors.win — Selector de color con convertidor HEX/RGB/HSL. Simple y rápido.
